description: A disgruntled developer deleted a proprietary credit risk model source file (risk_model.py) from the repository and attempted to clean up the Docker image acme/credit-score:v1 by adding a deletion step. The file is gone from the current file system, but it still exists in the image's layer history. Recover the original risk_model.py file from the acme/credit-score:v1 image history and save it to ~/Desktop/risk_model.py. The recovered file must contain the valid Python code for the CreditRiskScorer class.
